narrative:
Tuscarawas 3 (precinct in Stark County) has 1,302 registered voters, with 50.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.5 percentage points.
